task_description: Prevent simultaneous background jobs of the same type by adding a partial unique index on the jobs table, catching IntegrityError in create_job, raising a DuplicateJobError, and handling it gracefully in the worker and route layers with appropriate logging and user feedback.

verification.summary: All 584 tests pass including 6 new tests covering duplicate job prevention. New tests exercise real code paths through the partial unique index constraint in SQLite.
